quotes: **Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy.

Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy. **Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

intent: Preserve approved readable color pairings and prevent known contrast failures.
rule_text: Use known-safe text/background pairs: Brand Blue (#00529b), Deep Blue (#003d74), Dark Navy (#011e45), or Graphite (#212121) on White (#ffffff), Light Blue (#e6f0f9), or Golden Sand (#fef1c8); and White (#ffffff) on Brand Blue (#00529b), Deep Blue (#003d74), or Dark Navy (#011e45). Do not use Gold (#ffc60a) or Sunshine (#faa31b) text on White (#ffffff), because these fail contrast; these gold tones are reserved for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
